title: WeBuild – Company Information (CompanyInfo) – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of a CompanyInfo attestation as defined in the CompanyInfo Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type. Base type is 'eu.we-build.companyinfo.1'.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. Typically the subject entity itself for self-issued EAA attestations, or the QTSP identifier for QEAA attestations.

employee_number.description: Total number of employees in the legal entity at the time of reporting. SHALL be a non-negative integer.

trade_alias.description: Registered trade names or aliases under which the legal entity operates. MAY contain zero or more text values.

previous_legal_name.description: Previously registered legal name(s) of the entity, as recorded in official company registers prior to the current legal name. MAY contain zero or more text values. SHALL NOT contain the current legal name.

financial_statements.description: Financial reporting data associated with the legal entity.

taxonomy.description: Financial reporting standard used to structure and label financial data.

facts.description: List of reported financial facts. At least one fact SHALL be present.

items.description: A single reported financial data point.

id.description: Unique identifier of the fact within the attestation. SHALL be unique within the facts array.

concept.description: Name of the reported metric. SHALL use standardized concept codes as defined in Section 2.8.4.

value.description: Reported numeric value of the fact. SHALL be a non-negative value for balance sheet and income statement items. MAY be negative for cash flow items representing outflows.

unit.description: Unit of measurement. SHALL be a valid ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values, '%' for ratios/margins, or 'ratio' for dimensionless ratios.

period_start.description: Start date of the reporting period. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). SHALL be equal to or earlier than period_end.

period_end.description: End date of the reporting period. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). SHALL be equal to or later than period_start.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For CompanyInfo attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the CompanyInfo attestation can be found or looked up.

schema_version.description: Version of the CompanyInfo attestation schema used.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
